description:
Two lines in Arabic script, possibly from a fiscal document. The second word may be dīnār." This is followed by the date 14 Jumādā II 537 AH = 4 January 1143 CE.

On the other side there is the end of a scroll with Hebrew text about the temple sacrifices.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
